faqs.question: What is the scope of MBA?
faqs.answer:
The scope of MBA course is increasing day by day. MBA is one of the big job oriented professional programme and the most one which has been sought by the students. Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.
The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. An MBA professional always plays a vital role in his/her company and this is why he used to keep in touch with the board of directors. No need to specify the companies who recruit the MBA professionals. All sectors including government and public have various industries, companies, institutions or related organizations, come in the job prospective fields for an MBA professional.
Some job profiles are listed here:
Brand Manager
Account Manager
International Business Manager
Marketing Executive
Business Technical Consultant
All the best.

faqs.question: Is Aligarh College of Engineering and Technology a good college/Institute?

As per Shiksha's verified reviews, Aligarh College of Engineering and Technology has a rating of 3.13 on the basis of Shiksha-verified reviews by students. faqs.question: What is covered in Machine Design subject in B.Tech course?
faqs.answer:
Dear candidate, the subject of Machine Design basically teaches you about the designing fundamentals of various types of machinery across industries. You get to learn about the different ways in which elements can be combined to form an equipment or machine system and get the work done in an effective manner.
The knowledge of this subject is very important for a mechanical engineer as he/she will have to put this to use in the future whenever they enter the workforce as a mechanical engineering professional.
Hope this cleared your doubt. Have a good day.

placements.overview:
Aligarh College of Engineering and Technology, is located in Aligarh, Uttar Pradesh. Established in 2001, it is a private institute approved by AICTE. Aligarh College of Engineering and Technology provides 14 UG and PG courses in 7 specialisations, namely Agriculture & Farm Engineering, Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electrical Engineering and Electronics & Communication Engineering. Theses programmes are offered in Full Time mode. B.E. / B.Tech, MBA/PGDM, MCA and BBA are some of the courses offered at Aligarh College of Engineering and Technology. Some of the streams in which these courses are offered include Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. The total fee at Aligarh College of Engineering and Technology ranges between INR 1,22,400 to 2,44,800. Aligarh College of Engineering and Technology has a student intake of 450 for all the courses. Aligarh College of Engineering and Technology offers all the infrastructural facilities to students.

Aligarh College of Engineering and Technology offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in Full Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as B.E. / B.Tech and BBA. Whereas, at PG level, Aligarh College of Engineering and Technology offers courses such as MBA/PGDM and MCA. Aligarh College of Engineering and Technology fee structure for all the courses is around INR 1,22,400 to 2,44,800.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Just don't waste your time and money if you want to seriously secure your future.

review_content.Placements: I am graduating this year but haven't secured a placement yet, even though I am one of the top students in my batch. Other colleges are getting at least some offers from service-based companies, but here, the placement and training coordinators haven't brought in a single company.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is no Wi-Fi, proper lab equipment, or teaching support from the college. There are no hostels for outsiders. Library and Canteen are available. It doesn't have a sports campus or any ground area for proper gameplay. Even events are held in areas where buses are parked.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Aligarh College of Engineering and Technology.

review_content.Placements: Approximately 70% of students are placed in this college. The highest package in this college is 7-8 LPA and the minimum package is 3 LPA. Top service-based companies recruit the students. Almost 80% of students got an internship in their pre-final year. The top roles offered in this college are software developer, full stack developed, android developed.
review_content.Infrastructure: Generally, classrooms are well maintained with whiteboards as well as a projector. The lab is also updated with time means upgraded technology is embedded in the lab for students. Hostels are also to good for both boys and girls. Both of them have separate rooms in the hostel.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Good infrastructure and the temple of knowledge with good teachers.

review_content.Placements: Above 70 percent of students are placed, and the average package for BBA students is 3 to 4 lacs. Teachers are very supportive, and the students are very friendly and helpful towards each other. The teachers also guide you for the future.
review_content.Infrastructure: Good infrastructure, clean seats, and water facilities. Canteen facilities are also very good. The behavior of teachers is very supportive, and the students are very friendly and helpful towards each other. The teachers also guide you for the future.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Aligarh College of Engineering and Technology review.

review_content.Placements: The average package of the companies who arrive their for placement is not much higher. The placement percentage is not much higher. Only 2 to 3 students from the whole course get placed. The companies that arrive there didn't offer much CTC from which a degree holder gets satisfied.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure at Aligarh College of Engineering and Technology is average. The classrooms are not as good as they should be for the amount of fees they charge. I would give them a 2 out of 5. The library is only accessible during break time; otherwise, you have to be in class.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Aligarh college of engineering and technology.

review_content.Placements: So I am going to tell you about the placement at Aligarh College of Engineering and Technology. The college placement is not so good because this college is in the locality of Aligarh means 7km outside Aligarh and Aligarh is not a hi-tech City. Many of the placements are at the low package of 2 LPA and the highest is 5 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good and they do not provide a hostel because every student in the college is local to ALIGARH. Department of every course is different from each other and the faculty of each department is different.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: This college is not good for students.

review_content.Placements: The placement cell is very good. Placement in-charge is very good, and he interacts with top companies. But only service-based companies visit our college for recruitment. The salary package is average. But placements are not good for other branches.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is no hostel in this college. We have to travel daily to book a PG room. Our campus is not Wi-Fi enabled. Classrooms are well-maintained. Laboratory is better. But you are not allowed to sit in the library.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are knowledgeable, qualified, and helpful. The teaching quality is better. This college is affiliated with AKTU. The course curriculum is relevant.

reviews.review_heading: Just don't waste your time and money if you want to seriously secure your future.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi, proper lab equipment, or teaching support from the college. There are no hostels for outsiders. Library and Canteen are available. It doesn't have a sports campus or any ground area for proper gameplay. Even events are held in areas where buses are parked.

reviews.review_heading: Aligarh College of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: Generally, classrooms are well maintained with whiteboards as well as a projector. The lab is also updated with time means upgraded technology is embedded in the lab for students. Hostels are also to good for both boys and girls. Both of them have separate rooms in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and the temple of knowledge with good teachers.
reviews.review_text: Good infrastructure, clean seats, and water facilities. Canteen facilities are also very good. The behavior of teachers is very supportive, and the students are very friendly and helpful towards each other. The teachers also guide you for the future.

reviews.review_heading: Aligarh College of Engineering and Technology review.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure at Aligarh College of Engineering and Technology is average. The classrooms are not as good as they should be for the amount of fees they charge. I would give them a 2 out of 5. The library is only accessible during break time; otherwise, you have to be in class.

reviews.review_heading: Aligarh college of engineering and technology.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good and they do not provide a hostel because every student in the college is local to ALIGARH. Department of every course is different from each other and the faculty of each department is different.

reviews.review_heading: This college is not good for students.
reviews.review_text: There is no hostel in this college. We have to travel daily to book a PG room. Our campus is not Wi-Fi enabled. Classrooms are well-maintained. Laboratory is better. But you are not allowed to sit in the library.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely, the overall experience with college is good.
reviews.review_text: Yes, there are Wi-Fi facilities available in college. The classroom is so good, and there is a proper library management system available. There are no hostel facilities available. The canteen is also available, which has good-quality food available.

reviews.review_heading: Highly satisfied with the faculty, management of the college.
reviews.review_text: Fully Wi-Fi campus, good plantation in the campus. Labs have all the facilities and latest technology. Library has the large stock of book related to all courses. The quality of food in the canteen is very good, hygienic and different variety of food is available.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with facilities and management of our college.
reviews.review_text: Our campus is fully Wi-Fi enabled. It has good plantation and greenery everywhere. Environment of the campus is friendly for students. Labs have all the facilities. Our college has a good library with books related to all the courses. Sports are available for the students. The quality of food served in the canteen is very good and hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the faculty, infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Fully Wi-Fi campus, good plantantion, quality of food is very good in the canteen. Medical facilities is also very good. Good guidance by the faculty regarding projects, lab work, studies, etc. College timing is suitable for students. Holidays are provided before the tests, Sessional and pre semester exam.

reviews.review_heading: The college has its uniform and management is not good.
reviews.review_text: The campus is not good as a school. The building gate is closed after the first lecture. The timing is not comfortable from 8 AM to 4 PM. Students are not allowed to roam on campus even if they have some free time. The college does not have a hostel or mess. It has an average cafeteria.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely good faculty with best teachers. Good infrastructure and better placements since 2021.
reviews.review_text: There are good labs for every department and big libraries. There is no hostel in the campus. Canteen is there with good quality food. There are also well air-conditioned smart classes and seminar rooms. There are no sports and games events conducted. Medical facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: There are no hostel facilities because it is in a local city. It is recommended to stay in rented rooms because the hostel does not provide good food. Paying rent is something that a self-sufficient student handles easily. Some of the students are from nearby Own City.

reviews.review_heading: Our college value for money with good guidance.
reviews.review_text: There are most of the facilities. Library, computer labs, chemistry labs and many other labs are available. Transport facilities are available. Classrooms are big enough that 70 students can sit at a time. There are 2 halls for seminars and other programs.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Aligarh College of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college was not good. Our course which was BCA for that course, there were no proper laboratories, and teachers did not have the practical knowledge to teach the students. The classroom was not hygienic and old-school-type. The library was good but students cannot take any random book without issuing it for reading. Only at the recess time library was accessible. There were no sports facilities at all in this college. Monkeys come to the campus and classroom and damage...

highlights.summary:
The ATMA 2026 May session registration has started for admission to the MBA/PGDM/MMS courses. The last date to register is Apr 21, 2026, with the exam being scheduled for May 3, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

reviews_list.review_title: Apply for a better future in BCA.

review_content.Placements: 95% of students got placed. A package of Rs.20,000 per month was offered in my course. Top recruiting companies were Microsoft, TATA, OS, IT Park, Google, etc. 98% of students went for internships yearly at Google and Microsoft. The roles offered were Software Developer.
review_content.Infrastructure: The Computer Science Department had smart classrooms, Wi-Fi, advanced labs, and a digital library. The hygienic canteen was open 24/7. Sports facilities like cricket, badminton, chess, etc., were available. The mess served varied and nutritious food. For programs, there was a seminar hall and a VIP hall.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: ITM Nanded has great fests and infra, but lacks strong faculty, placements. Needs major improvement.

review_content.Placements: Around 20–25% of students were placed through campus recruitment. The internship opportunities were quite limited. Roles offered included HRM, Business Development Executive, Operations Executive, and positions in the banking sector. I did not know much about the campus hiring or the highest and lowest packages, but if you expected a college with less fee, you could chose this college with blind trust. It definitely provided a good educational experience. Each batch had around 50 to 80 students. I wasn’t sure about the highest package, but initial offers typically started from 3–4 LPA. Roles were mainly offered in the banking sector and companies like TCS, among others.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Our college provides good and supportive faculty members.

review_content.Placements: Bright students who tried off-campus placements got placed with good salary packages. Many students were not placed in good companies as our college provided very less chances.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college provided two labs with good Wi-Fi connections where students used to do projects, practice programs, etc. Lab technicians cleared the doubts of the students in labs. Classrooms had a good and clean environment that can be rated 10 out of 10.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers in our college were good. Exams conducted were average. Semester exams' pass marks were 30 out of 75. Exams were conducted theoretically by SRTMUN with a medium level of difficulty. Exams center was different from a regular college, so the exam environment was strict.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Hospitality Studies - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Institute of Technology and Management excels in placements.

content.Placements: Approximately 95% of students get placed in our course. The highest package offered is 50 LPA, and the lowest package offered is 6.5 LPA. The top recruiting companies for our course are Marriott, Taj Hotel, LaLiT Hotel, Ambassador, VIT Hostel, etc. Around 90% of students secured internships.
content.Infrastructure: Our institute has a kitchen, a VIP hall, and a seminar hall. It also has computer labs, a library, and a housekeeping lab, where all the housekeeping practices should be done. My institute has a separate canteen where all students and staff consume their meals.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Apply for a better future in BCA.

content.Placements: 95% of students got placed. A package of Rs.20,000 per month was offered in my course. Top recruiting companies were Microsoft, TATA, OS, IT Park, Google, etc. 98% of students went for internships yearly at Google and Microsoft. The roles offered were Software Developer.
content.Infrastructure: The Computer Science Department had smart classrooms, Wi-Fi, advanced labs, and a digital library. The hygienic canteen was open 24/7. Sports facilities like cricket, badminton, chess, etc., were available. The mess served varied and nutritious food. For programs, there was a seminar hall and a VIP hall.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: ITM Nanded has great fests and infra, but lacks strong faculty, placements. Needs major improvement.

content.Placements: Around 20–25% of students were placed through campus recruitment. The internship opportunities were quite limited. Roles offered included HRM, Business Development Executive, Operations Executive, and positions in the banking sector. I did not know much about the campus hiring or the highest and lowest packages, but if you expected a college with less fee, you could chose this college with blind trust. It definitely provided a good educational experience. Each batch had around 50 to 80 students. I wasn’t sure about the highest package, but initial offers typically started from 3–4 LPA. Roles were mainly offered in the banking sector and companies like TCS, among others.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Our college provides good and supportive faculty members.

content.Placements: Bright students who tried off-campus placements got placed with good salary packages. Many students were not placed in good companies as our college provided very less chances.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provided two labs with good Wi-Fi connections where students used to do projects, practice programs, etc. Lab technicians cleared the doubts of the students in labs. Classrooms had a good and clean environment that can be rated 10 out of 10.
content.Faculty: Teachers in our college were good. Exams conducted were average. Semester exams' pass marks were 30 out of 75. Exams were conducted theoretically by SRTMUN with a medium level of difficulty. Exams center was different from a regular college, so the exam environment was strict.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: The college has good infrastructure and good faculty members.

content.Placements: Around 85-90 percent of students got placed. The highest package is about 12 LPA, and the lowest package is 3.5 LPA. The average package ranges from 6-7 LPA. Top recruiting companies for our course include TCS, Wipro, Infosys, and Cognizant. Nearly 70 percent of students secured internships in companies like Amazon, Zoho, and Deloitte. Major roles offered are editor, designer, content creator, and media associate.
content.Infrastructure: The department offers smart classrooms, high-speed Wi-Fi with well-equipped computers, and a resourceful library. Hostels are clean with good rooms, good mess food, canteen options, and medical support. There are active sports facilities for students. It offers good food.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: This is a school-named college

content.Placements: In my college, the placements are just okay because the highest LPA is 5, but other colleges provide more than my college through their placements to the students. For those placements, we spend 10,000 per year, but there are no effective companies we could meet.
content.Infrastructure: Hostels are below average in their rooms, bathrooms, and their school-like rules. In classrooms, they do not allow mobiles, and if any mobile is seen, it is seized by the faculty and given back only after a 3-month duration.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It is the worst college with the worst transport and the worst classroom facilities.

content.Placements: The worst placements are offered to students. Per year, we are paying Rs. 5,000 and a total of Rs. 20,000, but they do not provide quality placement education. The worst placement offers are provided to students, and they call companies with a package of 5 LPA only. However, other colleges provide starting packages from 5 LPA onwards.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has the worst benches and desks for us. It does not allow us to use a mobile inside the college, and we should hand over to the mobile counter, which is compulsory. In labs, computer screens are polarised and look very scary. PC has only 2 GB of RAM. The college canteen is also worse, with high-cost food, and the quality is poor.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Best Chettinad- a wisdom for holistic learning.

content.Placements: About 90% of the students are placed in various companies. The highest package is around 7.5 LPA and the lowest is about 3 LPA. The top recruiting companies include TCS, Zoho, Terv, and others. Approximately 99% of the students secure internships through our course at various companies across Tamil Nadu. Our students are placed in marketing, administration, software development, and testing, and they are working successfully in all these areas.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides full facilities for us to work on projects, with very good infrastructure in the labs and throughout the campus. The college design is beautiful, and the library is unique compared to other colleges. The hostel facilities are of good quality, and the food in the mess and canteen is also good. Medical facilities include first aid, and there is a doctor available outside the college who can assist if needed.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The worst college is not of value, the university is very poor.

content.Placements: Internships are among the worst experiences, and trading positions with Nann Mudylan are also disappointingly bad. The recruitment often offers salaries ranging from 1 lakh to 5 lakh, but 90 percent of students who worked there for five months had unsatisfactory outcomes. Some students are not able to secure jobs, yet the college claims to provide 100% job offers, which feels like a total waste of the education received at Chettinad College.
content.Infrastructure: The computer labs are subpar requiring only 2GB of RAM and an HDD. There is no Wi-Fi inside the college and the transportation provided by the college buses is inadequate. Classes are often delayed after the breaks lasting around 4 to 6 minutes.

admission_process.title: Chettinad College of Engineering and Technology Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: Chettinad College of Engineering and Technology admissionsare offered through Management Quota and Single Window Counseling by Anna University, Chennai. Candidates have to follow the below steps to get a seat in the college:
1. Chettinad College of Engineering and Technology Application Process 2026

Candidates have to apply for TNEA after completing Class 12 for BE/ BTech. Aspirants have to apply for TANCET for MBA course. In case of any query, candidates can fill out the admission enquiry form on the official website of the college.
2. Selection
Candidates are selected for BE/ BTech based on their TNEA rank. The rank is determined based on the Class 12 scores of the candidates. For MBA admission, aspirants have to pass TANCET.
3. Counselling & Seat Allotment

BTech applicants are offered seat based on their rank via TNEA Counselling. Candidates need to participate in Single Window Counseling by Anna University, Chennai for admission. Aspirants who are allotted seat need to report at the college for document verification and fee payment.

Candidates who are offered seat have to pay the course fee. The total fee includes components suchas tuition fee, exam fee, caution deposit, etc. Check below theChettinad College of Engineering and Technology feesand intake:
